chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of One Who Has No Heir

text: 5714 - رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "مَنْ مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَارِثٌ مِنْ قَرَابَةٍ وَ لاَ مَوْلَى عَتَاقَةٍ قَدْ ضَمِنَ جَرِيرَتَهُ فَمَالُهُ مِنَ اَلْأَنْفَالِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5714 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"Whoever dies and has no heir from relatives nor a freed slave who has guaranteed his liability (jarirah), then his wealth belongs to the anfal (public treasury or property of the Islamic state)."
